nasb.text: But Queen Vashti refused to come at the king’s command delivered by the eunuchs. Then the king became very angry and his wrath burned within him.

esv.text: But Queen Vashti refused to come at the king’s command delivered by the eunuchs. At this the king became enraged, and his anger burned within him.

cnv.text: 王后瓦實提卻不肯遵照王藉著太監所傳的命令，所以王非常生氣，怒火中燒。

ccb.text: 但瓦实提王后违抗太监所传的谕旨，拒绝前来，王非常生气，怒火中烧。
